parameters.name: openclaw_send_message
parameters.description: Send a message to another OpenClaw (n8n-claw) agent instance on a remote server and get the response. Parameters: message (required, the message to send), user_id (sender identifier, default 'openclaw-bridge'), session_id (for conversation continuity, auto-generated if empty), source (source identifier, default 'openclaw'), metadata (JSON string of additional metadata)

value.message: ={{ $fromAI('message', 'The message to send to the remote agent', 'string') }}
value.user_id: ={{ $fromAI('user_id', 'User ID or empty string for default openclaw-bridge', 'string') }}
value.session_id: ={{ $fromAI('session_id', 'Session ID for conversation continuity or empty string for auto-generated', 'string') }}
value.source: ={{ $fromAI('source', 'Source identifier or empty string for default openclaw', 'string') }}
value.metadata: ={{ $fromAI('metadata', 'JSON string of additional metadata or empty string', 'string') }}
